results.title: Benjamin Kheng denies weight loss drug rumours, says it's from running 60km a week after health scare
results.description: His LDL reading was 252, which he described as "really bad."

results.title: New NIH-funded center at Pitt explores ‘natural predators of bacteria’
results.description: PITTSBURGH — For more than a century, antibiotics have been medicine's go-to weapon against bacterial infections.
